overall.description: A video game simulation showing the view from a ship's bridge during a nighttime storm. The camera faces forward over the vessel's bow with three navigation monitors visible overhead, while periodic lightning flashes illuminate the dark ocean waters ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigating through stormy seas at night

events.description: bright lightning flash illuminates the ocean surface and ship bow
lightning strike lights up the surrounding water and vessel structure
lightning flash briefly reveals stormy sea conditions ahead

agents.ego_description: operating the ship from the bridge, monitoring navigation radar and charts while proceeding steadily through stormy waters

entered.detail: leftmost display showing nautical chart with landmasses and vessel position
center circular display with rotating radar sweep showing navigation contacts
rightmost display showing depth finder and sonar readings
forward deck and bow of the vessel visible through the bridge windows
dark stormy sea surrounding the vessel with visible wave motion
structural frame of the bridge window on the left side
structural frame of the bridge window on the right side
metal safety railing visible just outside the bridge windows

segments.scene_description: The view from a ship's bridge during a nighttime storm, with three navigation monitors displaying charts, radar, and sonar data. The vessel moves steadily forward through dark waters, with the bow visible ahead and periodic lightning flashes illuminating the ocean surface.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady forward perspective from a ship's bridge as it navigates through a volatile nighttime storm. It begins with a view over the vessel's bow, where three overhead navigation monitors glow with active charts, radar, and sonar data. As the ship pushes through the dark waters, the oppressive gloom is periodically broken by sudden flashes of lightning. These bursts of light momentarily illuminate the churning ocean surface before the scene recedes back into deep shadow.
